license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Skagway, Alaska, 1899
description: 1899 panoramic photograph of the Skagway waterfront and dock during the Klondike Gold Rush era, showing the railroad wharf, steamships, and snow-capped mountains behind the town.
alt: Panoramic view of the Skagway waterfront in 1899 during the Klondike Gold Rush, with steamships at the railroad wharf and snow-capped mountains behind
